title: Zions Bancorporation (ZION) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An intrinsic value estimate for Zions Bancorporation.

assumptions.revenueGrowth: null - Free cash flow metrics are generally non-applicable or deeply distorted for commercial banks like Zions Bancorporation. As such, standard DCF modeling using revenue growth to project FCF is unworkable, and this assumption is omitted.
assumptions.terminalGrowthRate: null - A traditional terminal growth rate applied to Free Cash Flow is not meaningful for valuing a financial institution. Bank valuation typically relies on Dividend Discount Models (DDM) or Price-to-Tangible Book Value multiples.
assumptions.discountRate: null - Because a standard Free Cash Flow DCF model cannot be reliably applied to the bank's capital structure, calculating a Weighted Average Cost of Capital (WACC) for this specific methodology was bypassed.
